summary: Tested all 7 new backend endpoints and 6 frontend features for Pet Life OS iteration 213. All 27 backend tests passed. All frontend features working. Fixed 3 bugs found during testing: CARE_IMAGINES undefined variable, wrong localStorage key for badges, and notification bell unread count field mismatch.

minor.issue: Returns 'unread' field but MemberNotificationBell.jsx read 'unread_count'. Fixed to read both with fallback.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: CareMobilePage.jsx used undefined 'CARE_IMAGINES' constant — would cause ReferenceError at runtime. Added 4 care-specific Mira Imagines cards.
FIXED: OverviewTab.jsx fetched badges with localStorage key 'authToken' but app uses 'tdb_auth_token'. Fixed to check 'tdb_auth_token' first.
FIXED: MemberNotificationBell.jsx read 'data.unread_count' but API returns 'data.unread'. Fixed with fallback.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new endpoints fully tested and working. Key bugs fixed: (1) CARE_IMAGINES constant added to CareMobilePage.jsx, (2) tdb_auth_token key fixed in OverviewTab.jsx for badges fetch, (3) unread vs unread_count field mismatch fixed in MemberNotificationBell.jsx. Backend credentials: member dipali@clubconcierge.in/test123, admin aditya/lola4304.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/automations/status: PASS - has daily_digest, birthday_reminders, medication_reminders with schedule
backend_endpoints.GET /api/paw-points/balance: PASS - gold tier for 2583 pts, gold threshold correctly set to 1500

frontend_features.MembershipCardTiers Gold Crown: PASS - Gold Crown showing for 2583 points (1500 threshold)
frontend_features.Dashboard Badges Section: PASS - 6 badges displayed after localStorage key fix
frontend_features.Care Mobile 4 tabs: PASS - care, services, health-vault, find-care all present
frontend_features.Health Vault tab content: PASS - Vaccinations and Medications sections visible
frontend_features.Get Care Plan modal: PASS - Opens Mira Imagines modal with exactly 4 cards
